blocks.heading: Contents

blocks.content: Start a new game and select the game's difficulty level. If you plan on getting the Platinum trophy, you will need at least two playthroughs. If you have a save data from *Trails of Cold Steel*, you can transfer your save file over. This will let you start a new game with some extra bonuses.

blocks.content: **Rean's Rank Bonuses**

**Note:** Watch the introduction sequence carefully. If you haven't beaten the original *Trails of Cold Steel*, this part will give you a summary of the ending of the original game, so **beware of the spoilers** you are about to see.

After the intro sequence is over, you will get to control **Rean**. Enemy information in this guide is based on **Normal mode** circumstances.

As you claim control, the game will let you know about **saving**. This is done by going to the menu and using the **Save** option. You can also access the **Cross-Save feature**, which lets you upload your save data to PSN. This is for players to transfer save files between the PS3 or Vita.

If you ever get lost, pressing the **Square** button will open the **Navigation menu**; it will also highlight your next objective on the bottom right of the screen.

1.  **Start:** Head downhill. You will notice a shining object. Examine it to receive Rean's equipment.
2.  **Orbment:** The game will let you know about the **Orbment** system. Go to the menu and equip your Master quartz under the Orbment section.
3.  **First Battle:** Run down the hill. You will see a monster; by touching it, you will engage in battle.
    *   *Tip:* If you manage to sneak up on a monster, or stun it with your field attack (Pressing the Confirm button, **X** or **O** in Japanese version), you will get an additional **advantage** during battle (extra turns and reduced enemy HP).
4.  **Monster Notes:** After defeating the monster, the game introduces **Monster Notes**. Each time you defeat a monster, additional data is filled in regarding enemies you have previously fought.
    *   *Tip:* To fill in this information immediately, use the **Battle Scope** item, a quartz with the spell **"Analyze"**, or **Emma and Eliot's Detector ability**.
5.  **Arts:** Continue east to see an event, then fight a rock-type creature. The game prompts you into the basics of **Arts**. This monster has high physical defense, so use the **Fire Bolt** spell to quickly defeat it.
6.  **Healing:** Further down the hill, Rean will notice an **Orbment Charging Station**. Examine it to fully restore your character's HP and EP.
7.  **Next Area:** Enter the next area to **Eisengard Mountains 2**.
blocks.heading: Gameplay Walkthrough

blocks.content:
*   Head down the hill to find a treasure chest containing a **Tear** quartz.
*   Go a little further; Rean will notice a strong type of monster. Fight it.
    *   *Mechanic:* The game introduces the **S-Craft** function. S-Crafts are super attacks that require 100-200 CP to perform (found under the Craft section). It can also be used by pressing **Triangle** when it's not your turn, although this adds a lot more delay to your turn.
*   **Loot:**
    *   South corner of the map: **Teara Balm**.
    *   East area: Event scene.
    *   Northeast corner: **Proxy Puppet** (treasure box).
*   **Path:** Take the southeast exit to **Eisengard Mountain 3**.
    *   Pick up the **Celestial Balm** at the treasure box directly south.
    *   Go to the south end to find an **Orbment Charging Station**. Heal yourself.
    *   Go to the southeast end to fight a boss battle.
blocks.heading: Eisengard Range

blocks.content: **Note:** Maps in this guide are designed with the compass facing north.

blocks.name: Magic Knight Ortheim
blocks.heading: Boss: Magic Knight Ortheim
blocks.strategy:
The first boss battle is pretty basic. The boss attacks with its sword.
Attack:** Use **Flame Strike** to hurt the boss; this ability has a chance to inflict **Burn**, which will help expedite its demise.
Healing:** Heal when Rean is under 3000 HP with either **Tear** or **Teara Balm**. If the boss gets 2 turns in a row, use a **Teara Balm** immediately.
Victory:** As soon as you've brought it under 15,000 HP, the battle will end.

blocks.content:
Watch the event scene; you will be introduced to **Elise**, **Alfin**, and **Toval** again. Afterwards, leave the building. The game introduces **events**:
*   **Story events** are marked with a **red exclamation mark**.
*   **Side events** are marked with a **green exclamation mark**.
blocks.heading: Ymir

blocks.content:
1.  **General Store "Plover"** (Southwest corner):
    *   Purchase **Imperial Chronicle Issue #1** and **Gambler Jack Reprint Chapter 1**.
    *   *Note:* There is a trophy for collecting all books found in the game.
2.  **Visit Red Exclamation Mark Areas:**
    *   **Rean's Parents** (Lucia and Baron Schwarzer) at the **Baron's Mansion**.
    *   **Elise and Celine** at the **Footbath** (Adds "Friends Note" to menu; collect profile pages for a bronze trophy).
    *   **Toval** at the **Inn & Pub "Valley Echo"** (Speak to pub owner Gerald for pancakes).
    *   **Werner** at the kitchen area of the Hotel **"The Phoenix Wings"** (Northeast on map).
        *   *Reward:* Adds the recipe section to the menu and a new recipe.
    *   **Princess Alfin** at the **Septian Church**.
    *   **Annabelle** at **Ymir Canyon**:
        *   Gives a fishing rod; adds fishing section to menu.
        *   If you have a save from the original *Cold Steel*, she gives Groundbait based on rank.
        *   Can exchange prizes.
blocks.heading: Activities in Ymir

blocks.content:
When done with activities:
1.  Go to the **Phoenix Wing** hotel and speak to the receptionist, **Baggins**.
2.  Go to the **Hot Springs** on the right side of the building.
    *   *Warning:* Entering the Hot Spring automatically advances the story. Finish everything else first.
3.  **Elise and Toval** will join your party.
4.  Go back inside the **Baron Mansion** and speak to **Alfin** for a short event scene.
5.  Use the **footbath** at the center of town to fully restore your party, including CP.
6.  Head to the **northwest exit** to go to **Ymir Canyon**.
blocks.heading: Progression

blocks.content:
Before advancing in Ymir Canyon (if playing on Nightmare or preparing for difficulty):
*   **Stock Up:** Aim for 15–20 **Teara Balms** and **Reviving Balms**.
*   **Farming:** Cook```markdown
**Salty Onigiri** with Elise to create **Tri-Colored Onigiri** (Superb result) and sell for 150 Mira each.
*   **Equipment:** Ensure all three characters are equipped with the best accessory from the store (boosts Strength, ATS, and Speed).
*   **Consumables:** Invest remaining funds in **EP Charges**.
blocks.heading: Fresh Nightmare Mode Recommendations

blocks.content:
Watch the event scene. When you encounter the first monster, the game introduces **Link attacks**:
*   Hitting enemies with the right attack type can cause them to unbalance, triggering a **Link attack** for bonus damage.
*   Finish off the first monster and continue.
blocks.heading: Ymir Canyon

blocks.content:
*   **Northeast end:** Treasure chest containing the **Lighter** accessory.
*   **Northwest path:** Reach the northwest end to find a monster chest with **Zeram Powder**.
    *   *Trophy:* Use **Toval's S-Craft** to kill all eight enemies at once to get the **Pieces of Eight** trophy.
*   **Backtrack:** Go back south, cross the bridge to the east.
    *   Pick up **U-Material** in the chest at the east end.
*   **North exit:** Head to **Ymir Canyon 2**.
blocks.heading: Treasure & Exploration

blocks.content:
*   Pick up the **Tearal Balm** on your way north.
*   Take the northwest path. The path splits:
    *   **South:** Find a **Poison Quartz** in the treasure box.
    *   **North:** Go all the way to the end.
        *   Find a chest with **Sepith** (All Colors x50).
        *   Just a little further: **Orbment Charging Station**. Heal up.
        *   Enter the next area for a boss fight.
blocks.heading: Ymir Canyon 2

blocks.name: Magic Knight Ortheim (Ymir Canyon)
blocks.heading: Boss: Magic Knight Ortheim (Ymir Canyon)
blocks.strategy:
Ortheim has a massive upgrade compared to the previous encounter.
Area Attack:** Can hit hard; be prepared.
Buff:** When Ortheim buffs itself, it raises attack power and restores 20% of its HP — prolonging the fight.
Healer:** Use **Elise** as your main healer. She can use **Holy Squall** (restores 60% HP in small radius) or **Tear**.
DPS:** Use **Rean** and **Toval** as main attackers. Rely on physical attacks and use your **S-Craft** on turns with a critical bonus.

**Boss Skills:**
*   **Sword Slash:** Hits everyone in front.
*   **Ground Stab:** Targets area around boss (L).
*   **Boost:** Grants boss **STR 50% Up** (Red) and cures **15,000 HP** (normal).

blocks.name: Magic Knight Ortheim (Phase 2) — Ashen Knight, Valimar
blocks.heading: Boss: Magic Knight Ortheim (Phase 2) — Ashen Knight, Valimar
blocks.strategy:
Mech combat is like playing **rock-paper-scissors**. You need to select a body part and hit.
Critical Hits:** Attacking the correct part lands a critical hit, allowing you to perform a **Link Attack** (damage bonus).
Phase 2 Strategy:**
Idle Stance:** Attack the **Head**.
Attack Stance:** Attack the **Arms**.
There isn't much strategy — just follow the pattern above to win.

**Stances & Weak Points:**

blocks.heading: Contents

blocks.content:
As soon as you gain control of **Rean**, you will notice the addition of **Quick Travel** under the navigation menu.

1.  **General Store**: Head to the general store and speak to **Raio** (shopkeeper on the right).
    *   *Learn*: Weapon synthesis and unlocking Orbment Slots.
    *   *Note*: The Orbment system involves upgrading slots to equip more potent Quartz.
2.  **Camillia**: Speak to Camillia. Watching the event scene unlocks the **Item Trading** function (similar to a pawn shop).
    *   *Note*: If this is a second playthrough, she allows trading Zemurian Ore Shards for 50 U-Materials.
3.  **Station**: Before leaving town through Ymir Canyon, speak to **Luke** near the wreckage.
    *   *Rewards*: He provides some **Tear Balms**.
blocks.heading: December 1st

blocks.content:
After the event scene, you will be warped into **Lunaria Nature Park**. Head south to **Lunaria Nature Park 3**.

*   **Mechanic**: This area contains **High Elements** (Time, Space, and Mirage). These elements affect monsters and turn order (can be an advantage or disadvantage).

**Lunaria Nature Park 3**
*   Southeast corner: **Stone Brooch** (Treasure Chest).
*   Southwest corner: **Sepith Mass x100** (Treasure Box).
*   Exit: Southeast to **Lunaria Nature Park 2**.

**Lunaria Nature Park 2**
*   West end: **Teara Balm** (Treasure Box) + Fishing Spot nearby.
*   East end: **Citrus Bottle** (Treasure Chest).
*   Bridge South -> West corner: **Scepter** (Master Quartz) (Monster Chest).
*   East area: **EP Charge II**.
*   Exit: South to **Lunaria Nature Park 1**.

**Lunaria Nature Park 1**
*   Northeast corner (East side): **HP 1** (Treasure Chest).
*   Southwest corner: **Sepith x100** (Treasure).
*   Center path South: **Orbment Charging Station**.
*   **Boss Battle**: Leave the park to face **Grunoja**.
blocks.heading: Lunaria Nature Park

blocks.name: Grunoja
blocks.strategy:
*   **HP**: 21,800
*   **Item Drop**: Attack 2
*   **Elemental Efficacy**: Earth (120%), Water (100%), Fire (140%), Wind/Time/Space/Mirage (100%)
*   **Overdrive**: Activate by highlighting the attack icon, holding the Right button when it changes icon, and pressing Confirm. It restores HP, EP, CP, grants 3 extra turns, and allows instant magic casts between linked characters.
*   Buff up characters and attack. The boss can buff itself, paralyze with Seal, or hit hard.
*   **Recommendation**: Use Toval's wind magic. Have Rean use *Autumn Leaf Cutter* or *Arc Slash* to delay the boss. If CP is maxed, save your S-Craft for when the boss's HP is low.

blocks.content: **Monster Guide (Lunaria Nature Park)**
**Treasure List (Lunaria)**

After defeating the boss:
1.  Leave the park and enter the farmhouse on the east side. Speak to residents for an event.
2.  Head south. There are **two treasure chests** around the southwest corner.
3.  Take the south exit for a short scene.
4.  Head west, pick up the treasure chest near the small tower, and take the southwest exit to **East Trista Highway**.
    *   **East Trista Highway**: Very short area. 3 treasure chests + fishing location to the west. Near the bridge, an event scene plays (Rean notices guards).
5.  Return to West Celdic Highway and take the southeast exit to **Celdic**.

**Monster Guide (Highways)**
blocks.heading: West Celdic Highway & East Trista Highway

blocks.content: **Treasure List (Highways)**

blocks.heading: Data
rows: EP Charge I / Earth Lance / Curia Balm

blocks.content:
When you enter Celdic, visit three key event locations (marked with red exclamation marks):
1.  **Becky**: Celdic House (Near West Celdic Highway entrance).
2.  **Margot**: Weathercock Inn (Behind the counter).
3.  **Rosine**: Grand Market.

After conversing with them, an event scene unfolds. Rean purchases **Imperial Chronicle Issue #2**. After reading and exiting, another event triggers.

**Next Steps:**
1.  **Grand Market**: Buy **Gambler Jack Reprint #2** and (if 2nd Playthrough) **Black Records #2** from Cornette's shop (center of market).
2.  **Chapel**: Speak with **Moulbaix** (west end). She teaches the recipe for **Fresh Vegetable Juice**.

**Exit**: Head towards East Celdic Highway.

**Rewards & Items**
*   **Recipe**: Fresh Vegetable Juice (Moulbaix, Celdic Chapel).
*   **Books**:
    *   *Gambler Jack Reprint #2*: Cornette's General Goods (Grand Market).
    *   *Black Records #2*: Cornette's General Goods (Second Playthrough only).
    *   *Gambler Jack II - Chapter 1*: Tarim (Near Farm on East Celdic Highway).
blocks.heading: Celdic

blocks.content:
1.  **North**: Locate treasure chest containing **Silver Earrings**.
2.  **Northeast Corner**: Talk to **Tarim** (NPC near farmhouse). He gives **Gambler Jack II Chapter 1**.
    *   *Note*: Collect all 14 volumes to exchange for the strongest weapon later. If missed, they can sometimes be found via Inspect Curios (unreliable).
3.  **Southeast Bridge**: Fishing spot. Treasure chest nearby triggers an event (Rean finds an **Old Key**).
4.  **Windmill (Center-South)**: Watch event scene. **Machias** joins your party.

**Return to Celdic**:
*   **Market Manager's House**: Speak to Manager Otto. This adds the Quest section to your Notebook and introduces **AP (Academic Points)**.
    *   *Goal*: Max AP per chapter = **S Rank**.
*   **Chapel**: Talk to **Rosine**. She gives 3 Tear Balms and adds page 1 to her profile.

**Side Quest: Munch no More**
*   **Quest Monster**: East Celdic Highway 2 (Northeast corner).
*   **Action**: Defeat the monster. Choose to return to Celdic and report to Manager Otto.
*   **Reward**: **Detection Quartz** (Displays all treasure chests on mini-map), 1500 Mira, 4 AP.
blocks.heading: East Celdic Highway

blocks.name: Giant Crop Muncher
blocks.strategy:
*   **HP**: 40,250
*   **Elemental Efficacy**: Earth (110%), Water (90%), Fire (120%), Wind (100%)
*   **Minions**: Crop Muncher x7 (HP: 3,680)

blocks.content:
**Story Quest: Herbal Remedies**
1.  **Celdic Chapel**: Speak to Father Zirbel behind the altar.
2.  **Grand Market**: Speak to Flint (Northwest stall).
3.  **West Celdic Highway**: Head north near Lunaria Nature Park Entrance. Speak to **Johnson** (NPC near gate).
4.  **Lunaria Nature Park**: Find **Cure Herb** at the northeast corner (near treasure chest).
5.  **Return**: Give herb to Father Zirbel.
*   **Reward**: Teara Balm x2, Celestial Balm x2, 4 AP.

**Advance Story**:
*   Exit Celdic -> East Celdic Highway -> Enter Windmill (South).
*   Examine communication device, select **2nd choice**.
*   Rendezvous at **Point D** (East Celdic Highway 3, Northeast end).
*   **Eliot and Fie** join.
    *   *Note*: Overdrive works between Rean and friends. For others, clear Trial Chests. Burst function and party switching are now available.

*   **Northeast Corner**: **Sepith Mass x100** (Treasure).
*   **Point D**: Join party members.
*   **Southwest Area**: Pick up all treasure chests.
    *   **Blue Treasure Chest (Trial Chest)**: Requires prearranged party to use Overdrive.
    *   *Tip*: Equip **Faint Resistant** accessory (Citrus Bottle from Lunaria Park helps).
*   **Southwest Exit**: Monster Chest containing **Gladiator Headband**.
*   **Exit**: Southeast to Twin Dragons Bridge.

**Trial Chest Boss: Senior Bear Mole**
*   **HP**: 20,250 (Normal)
*   **Minions**: Bear Mole x4
*   **Item Drop**: Crest R
*   **Skills**: Hammer Swing (Knockback/Faint), Jump Slam (Faint).
*   **Strategy**: Wait for moles to gather, use S-Craft. Machias (Petrify Shell), Eliot (Area Attack/Healer).
blocks.heading: East Celdic Highway 3

blocks.content:
1.  **Waiting Lounge (North)**: Speak to **Morize** (Northwest corner). She teaches **Cheese Omelet** recipe.
2.  **Event**: Go near the bridge to see a merchant arguing with a soldier.
3.  **Duct**: Examine duct to advance story, go to Garrelia Side.
blocks.heading: Twin Dragons Bridge

blocks.name: A Cry For Help
blocks.content:
*   **Start**: Leave Twin Dragons Bridge after the merchant/soldier event. Head north near East Celdic Highway 2.
*   **Location**: East Celdic Highway 3 (near the 100 Sepith Mass chest).
*   **Action**: Defeat monsters. Select **1st choice** to return to Twin Dragons Bridge.
*   **Completion**: Speak to the three merchants (Left, Center, Right) in the Waiting Lounge. Go to the east side of the building for an event.
#### Twin Dragons Bridge - Garrelia Side
*   **Garrelia Byroad**:
*   **Merchant (Under Bridge)**: Buy **Contact Lens** (Costume attachment) instead of exchanging U-Material later.
*   **Treasure**: Celestial Balm (Northwest path), Defense 2 Quartz (North end).
*   **Trial Chest**: Clear to unlock Overdrive for Eliot and Fie.
*   **Garrelia Byroad 2**:
*   **Holy Chain**: South path treasure chest.
*   **EP Charge I**: North path.
*   **Reaper Quartz**: Southeast end monster chest.
*   **Garrelia Fortress**: Northeast entrance. **Save Game** at Orbment Station.
**Boss: Xeno & Leonidas**
*   **Type**: Unwinnable battle (Story).
*   **Objective**: Reduce one boss's HP to **30% or below** by turn 40 for Bonus AP.
*   **Strategy**: Full CP party. Buff with Rean, use S-Craft + Overdrive. Use AT Delay skills (Arc Slash, Bullet Cyclone). Elliot as main healer. Watch for S-Crafts (70% damage) and mines (scan for trophy).
*   **AP**: 3 AP for completing the objective.
**Boss: Drakkhen (Sword)**
*   **Mech Battle**: Focus on one unit. Attack **Body** in Idle Stance, **Head** in Offensive Stance.
*   **Drakkhen (Gun)**: Backup Pilot mode active. Attack **Head** in Idle Stance, **Body** in Offensive Stance.
*   *Rewards*: 100 Link EXP between partners.
**After Battle**:
*   **Resting Area (North)**: Speak to **Arbekker** to receive **Gambler Jack II - Chapter 2**.
*   **Profiles**: Speak to Monica (General Store) and Munk (Dining) to add to notebook.
*   **Exit**: Examine Valimar, select 1st choice.

items.label: **Quest**: Leaf it to Me (Speak to Alf & Kiki near Station).
Attending **Machias** and **Claire** events adds pages to their profiles.
**Start**: Speak to **Alf & Kiki** (kids near station). Choose **1st option** (Offer assistance).
**Note**: Scan the monkey-like monster in Ymir Valley for Battle Trophy.

blocks.content:
*   Head to your room at the Baron's mansion. Select the **1st choice** to end Part 1.
*   **AP Calculation**: The game accumulates all AP earned.
    *   **S-Rank Requirement**: Total of **35 AP**.

**AP Breakdown**
blocks.heading: End of Part 1
Data
rows: Fight against Xeno and Leonidas (30% HP)

blocks.content:
*   **Start:** Leave town through **Ymir Valley**.
*   **Party Selection:** Choose **two** members from Class VII and **one** guest (Claire or Toval). This choice is permanent for this segment.
*   **Key Tip:** If you bring Toval or Claire, their S-Crafts can be very useful for early boss fights.
blocks.heading: Overview

blocks.content:
After the initial scene, you warp to the northwest. Use the map to track treasure chests.

*   **Zender Gate:**
    *   Trigger the event to receive a **Horse**.
    *   Speak to **Marx** in the Mess Hall to learn the **Potato Croquette** recipe.
    *   **Shop:** Buy new weapons here (skip armor; better options await at Lake Lacrima).
    *   **NPCs:** Find **Beryl** (Mess Hall) and **Mint** (outside).
    *   *Note:* The southeast area is locked. Return later for chests.
*   **Nord Settlement (Northeast):**
    *   Head here to trigger a boss battle.

**Boss: Jaegers (Greatsword & Rifle)**
blocks.heading: Nord Highlands - South (Part A)
Data
rows: High damage (2k-3.5k/hit). They can resurrect allies. Use S-Crafts immediately.
Focus fire to prevent resurrection chains.

blocks.content: **Tip:** Buff your party and unleash S-Crafts from Toval or Claire to cheese this fight.

*   **Gaius** joins your party.
*   **Elder's House:** Speak to **Old Lady Jedah** for the **Hot Milk Tea** recipe.
*   **Doctor's House:** Speak to **San** (next to Dr. Amr) for **Gambler Jack II - Chapter 3**.
*   **General Store:** Buy **Gambler Jack Reprint #3**.
*   **Activity:** Fishing is available at the pier.
blocks.heading: Lake Lacrima

blocks.content:
*   **Route:** Head to **Nord Highlands - Northeast** via the southeast exit (Gaius blocks the south path).
*   **Treasure:**
    *   *South Corner:* **Floral Bottle**.
    *   *North Area:* **Harvest** quartz.
*   **Boss: Unsurtr**
    *   **HP:** 48,360
    *   **Weakness:** **Fire** (150% efficacy).
    *   **Danger:** *Frost Edge* and *Icicle Missiles* can inflict **Freeze**.
    *   **Strategy:**
        *   Equip **Freeze-resistant** accessories.
        *   Alisa's *Heavenly Gift* provides CP regen and **Insight** (dodge buff).
        *   Use Fire arts (e.g., Alisa's *Heatwave*) and S-Crafts.

**Post-Boss:** You return to Lake Lacrima. Fast travel is now unlocked.
*   **Trial Chest (Nord Highlands - North Center):** Unlocks **Overdrive** for Alisa and Millium.
*   **Side Quests:** Speak to the Elder for quest logs.
blocks.heading: Nord Highlands - North & Northeast

blocks.content:
*   **Client:** Lacan (Elder's House).
*   **Task:** Defeat 3 groups of **Galion Cougar** in Nord Highlands - North.
*   **Reward:** Nord Bracelet, All Monster Ingredients x3, 1,500 Mira, **4 AP**.
blocks.heading: 1. Side Quest: Highlands Hunt

blocks.content:
*   **Client:** Sheeda (Northwest Lake Lacrima).
*   **Task:** Find the foal in 3 locations:
    1.  Southeast corner of Nord Highlands - Northeast.
    2.  Northeast end of Nord Highlands - Northeast.
    3.  Nord Settlement.
*   **Reward:** Food Ingredients x3, 2,000 Mira, **4 AP**.
blocks.heading: 2. Side Quest: Foaling Around

blocks.content:
*   **Reward for Clearing:** **3 AP**.
*   **Key Items:**
    *   *Trial Chest:* For Alisa & Gaius.
    *   *Chests:* **Aerial** quartz, **Sleep** quartz, **EP Charge II**, **Sepith Mass**, **Criminal** (Master Quartz).
*   **Boss: Tildawn - Pazuu x3**
    *   **Weakness:** **Time, Space, Mirage**.
    *   **Danger:** *Black Energy* inflicts **Sleep**; *Aerial* (Wind art) deals massive damage.
    *   **Strategy:**
        *   Equip **Sleep-resistant** accessories.
        *   Use **Impede** arts to cancel enemy casting.
        *   Gaius can tank with *Insight*; use Alisa to heal/regen CP.
blocks.heading: 3. Dungeon: Aria Shrine (Nord Highlands - Northeast)

blocks.content:
*   **Client:** Zats or Manning (Zender Gates, Store Area).
*   **Task:** Examine 4 tank wrecks in Nord Highlands - South (marked with green exclamation points). Find a pendant in the 4th wreck and return it to Zats.
*   **Reward:** EP Charge x5, 2,000 Mira, **4 AP**.
blocks.heading: 4. Hidden Quest: Zats Amore

items.label: Speak to **Officer Ogram** (Zender Gates) for **Gambler Jack II - Chapter 4**.
Open the **Trial Chest** (Southeast area) to complete Overdrive for other characters.
Enter via the southeast corner of Nord Highlands - South (red exclamation mark).
**Condition:** Defeat within **40 turns** for bonus AP (3 AP).
Enter with full CP. Unleash all S-Crafts immediately.
Use **Alisa's Heavenly Gift** for CP regen mid-fight.
Atina uses *Black Barrier* (blocks 1 physical hit); attack her to nullify it.
Focus on one unit at a time.
Use **Fie's** speed buff for extra turns.
Use co-pilot **Shinki** to heal or **Charge** for CP if EP runs low.
Target the **body** of the Spiegel unit regardless of stance.

blocks.content:
*   **General Store (Camilla):**
    *   Start Hidden Quest: **Azuki's Adventure**.
    *   Buy **Onion Soup** recipe.
    *   Buy **Imperial Chronicle Issue #3**.
*   **Residence (Southeast of Tavern):** Speak to **Masha** for **Gambler Jack II - Chapter 5**.
*   **Snowboard Mini-Game:** Complete the new difficulty for the **Hare** quartz.
*   **Character Profiles:**
    *   Speak to **Claire** (Southeast of Baron's Mansion) → Claire Page 2.
    *   Attend **Sharon's** bonding event (Baron's Mansion Kitchen) → Sharon Page 1.
    *   Attend **Toval's** bonding event (Near Station) → Toval Page 2.
*   **Ymir Valley:** New monster **Snow Rat** appears (scan for trophy).
blocks.heading: Ymir Town Activities

blocks.name: Azuki's Adventure
blocks.content:
*   **Task:** Talk to these 4 NPCs:
1.  **Werner** (Phoenix Wings Kitchen)
2.  **Gerald** (Tavern, behind counter)
3.  **Luke** (Near Station)
4.  **Sister Lisa** (Septian Church)
Return to your room after completing all activities to finish Act 1 - Part 2 and achieve the **S-Rank**.

Select your party members. By now, if you've been fishing, you should have ranked up. You can obtain a new fishing rod from **Annabelle**, who is at the general store. Make your preparations and exit town via **Ymir Valley**.

Choose **two members from Class VII** and **one guest character** (Claire, Sharon, or Toval) to accompany you. Once the decision is made, you won't have the option to change your party members.
*   **Important:** This is the only segment in the game where you can use **Sharon**. If you don't bring her along, you'll miss this chance until you start a new playthrough.
*   **Recommended Party:** **Alisa** and **Sharon**. Sharon possesses formidable crafts, and Alisa can serve as a CP battery, making them a very strong pair.
blocks.heading: Party Selection

blocks.content:
You will end up at **Ebel Highway 2**. Pick up the **Flame Tongue** quartz near Valimar. Then head directly to **Legram** by going south. The game won't let you fully explore Ebel Highway yet, so pick up the rest of the treasure chests later.

**Enemy Drops & Treasure:**
blocks.heading: Ebel Highway
Data
rows: Celestial Balm, EP Charge II, Blue Scaled Mail
EP Charge II, Tearal Balm, Grand Press

blocks.content:
Watch the event scene at the **Bracer Guild**. Then go to **Aprikoze Inn** and speak to **Weiber** behind the counter; he will give you a copy of *Gambler Jack II - Chapter 6*. Take the back door outside and speak to **Old Man Bem**; he will teach you the **Seafood Pilaf** recipe.

Head to the **General Store** and purchase *Gambler Jack Reprint #4*, and stock up on new equipment.
*   **Thors Academy Students:** **Vivi** is at the Church, and **Casper** is at the Training School.
*   **Fishing:** If you go to the harbor, you can find a fishing spot near **Klaus**.

When you are ready, speak to **Klaus** to go to **Lohengrin Castle**. Climb up the hill and go inside; you will fight a boss shortly after.
blocks.heading: Legram

blocks.name: Zelvenom
blocks.heading: Boss: Zelvenom
blocks.strategy:
This boss is quite easy compared to previous fights. It has a strong area attack that can cause poison, but you should be able to defeat it before it becomes a hassle. Since the boss has very poor slash resistance, deal damage with Slash-type characters like **Laura** and **Rean**. It is also weak against Mirage arts (Emma). Status ailments work well. If **Sharon** is in your party, the fight is super easy due to her area healing craft that removes status ailments.
After the event scene, **Laura** and **Emma** will join your party. Head to the **Bracer Guild** (southeast) and speak to **Miles** for side quests.

*   **HP:** 45,225
*   **Elemental Efficacy:** Earth (110), Water (100), Fire (90), Wind (100), Time (100), Space (100), Mirage (140)
*   **Unbalance Efficacy:** Slash (★★★☆), Thrust (★☆☆☆), Pierce (★★☆☆), Strike (★☆☆☆)
*   **Boss Skills:**
*   **Poison Breath:** Area (L). Inflicts Poison.
*   **Tail Swipe:** Area (L). Push back.

blocks.name: Arseid School Bout 2
blocks.content:
Go to the **Arseid School Training Hall** and speak to **Klaus** or **Gaveli** at the arena. Members of the Arseid School want a rematch. Select the first choice to fight them in a duel. Rean and Laura are automatically included; select two other members.
*   *Note: You cannot use guest characters for this fight.*
**Bosses:**
*   **Fritz** (36,352 HP)
*   **Ares** (27,440 HP)
*   **Gaveli** (36,707 HP)
*   **Datt** (27,440 HP)
**Strategy:** Students are weak against status ailments. **Laura** has a good chance of causing Faint; **Rean's Gale** can Seal them. They are also easily blinded. If their HP gets low, they buff and heal, becoming dangerous with area skills dealing 5000+ damage. You can cheese this with S-Crafts, or drag it out for analysis.

blocks.name: Ebel Rebel
blocks.content:
Head out through **Ebel Highway**. The quest monster is at **Ebel Highway 2** near the entrance to Ebel Highway 3.
*   *Recommendation:* Equip a Faint-resistant accessory.
**Boss: Gordi Schnarr G**
*   **HP:** 98,467
*   **Elemental Efficacy:** Earth (120), Water (100), Fire (140), Wind (100), Time (100), Space (100), Mirage (100)
*   **Unbalance Efficacy:** Slash (★★☆☆), Thrust (★☆☆☆), Pierce (★☆☆☆), Strike (★☆☆☆)
*   **Boss Skills:**
*   **Slam:** Area (M). Inflicts Faint.
*   **Roar:** Heal + Str/Spd 50%.
*   **Charge Slam:** Takes 2 turns. Inflicts Faint (Can be Cancelled).
**Strategy:** The boss has massive HP and is very strong. It uses "Drumming" to heal and buff Str/Def/Spd, allowing multiple hits. It can cause Faint and deals nearly 7000 damage with "Hard Hit" when its buff expires.
*   **Best Approach:** Use **Flame** type arts for maximum damage. Use Overdrive for instant magic casts. When the boss is at ~50% HP, spam S-Crafts before it can re-buff.
After defeating the boss, you can instantly return to Legram. Report to **Miles** at the Bracer Guild to finish the quest.

Return to **Ebel Highway**. Take the north exit to **Ebel Highway 2**, examine **Valimar** for a short event, then take the northeast exit to **Ebel Highway 3**.

Head to the **northwest exit** to reach **Aqua Shrine**. Clearing this gives **3 extra AP**. There is also a fishing spot near the waterfall.
blocks.heading: Ebel Highway 3 & Aqua Shrine

blocks.content:
1.  **Entry:** Head downstairs, open the gate.
2.  **Water Level 1:** Follow the west path to the **northwest corner**. Press the switch to lower the water level.
3.  **Trial Chest:** Follow the west path, then go all the way east. Defeat the Trial Chest Boss for a reward.
4.  **Monster Chest:** Follow the south path. When you see stairs, take the **north path** to find a monster chest containing the **Scent** quartz.
5.  **Treasure:** Backtrack to the south stairs. Find **Blue Scaled Shoes** in a treasure box.
6.  **Water Level 2:** Go to the west side. Open the chest for an **EP Charge II**, then push the switch to raise the water.
7.  **Boss Path:** Take the center path to the northwest area.

**Trial Chest Boss: King Crysnetic**
*   **HP:** 33,157
*   **Drop:** Shining R
*   **Strategy:** Easy fight. Enemies cause Mute with area attacks. Use **Laura's S-Craft** or **Brilliant Spin** to clear mobs. Focus on the boss with Emma's Arts and Laura's attacks.

**Boss: Tildawn Glacia x3**
*   **HP:** 43,097
*   **Elemental Efficacy:** Earth (100), Water (0), Fire (120), Wind (100), Time (130), Space (130), Mirage (130)
*   **Strategy:** Similar to previous Tildawns but causes Mute. If your party relies on magic, cancel their casting with **Impede** crafts (Rean, Machias, Alisa, Fie). To cheese: Rean in Overdrive, Motivate x2, then S-Craft spam.
*   **Reward:** Curia Balm, U-Material.

After the boss, take the portal to exit. Collect any remaining chests in Ebel Highway 3, then take the **northeast exit** to **South Kreuzen Highway**.
blocks.heading: Aqua Shrine Exploration

blocks.content:
*   **Bridge Scene:** Move forward for a short scene.
*   **Northwest Corner:** Fishing spot and **Hydro Cannon** quartz.
*   **Northeast Corner:** **Sepith Mass** in a chest.
*   **North Region (Split Path):**
    *   West: **Tearal Balm**.
    *   East: Monster chest with **Tauros Master Quartz**.
*   **Exit:** Return to center, take north exit to **Bareahard**.

*Warning: Entering Bareahard advances the story. Finish all Legram side quests first.*
blocks.heading: South Kreuzen Highway
Missable Items & Tasks
rows: Underground Waterway (After Abyss Drome, New Game+ only)
**Old Lady Eva** (Central Plaza, near Underground Waterway)

blocks.content:
1.  **Valenty Tailoring** (Artisan's Street): Buy the **Patterned Shirt** (20% evasion, best for dodge tanks like Fie/Sharon) and **Leather Sandal** (High speed).
2.  **Turner's Jewelers** (Artisan's Street): Buy Pendulums to resist status effects.
    *   Red Pendulum x3
    *   Green Pendulum x3
    *   Blue Pendulum x4
    *   Yellow Pendulum x4
    *   Dark Pendulum x4
    *   *Cost:* 3,000 Mira each (Total 54,000 Mira). Use Sharon's cooking to sell Tri-colored Onigiri if short on funds.
3.  **Recipes:** Speak to **Colette** (Turner's Jewelers), then go to **Sorciere Restaurant** and speak to **Calmin** for *Fluffy Pancake*.
4.  **Books:** Speak to **Saffron** (Station Street), then buy *Gambler Jack Reprint #5, #6* at **Fortnum Books** (Christie's Galleria 2F). Speak to **Theresia** by the bench.
blocks.heading: Equipment & Preparation

blocks.name: Missin' Kitten
blocks.content:
1.  Speak to **Old Lady Eva** in Central Plaza (near Underground Waterway).
2.  Talk to the marked NPCs:
*   **Hasan:** Dining tables by Sorciere Restaurant.
*   **Biske:** Artisan's Street (near South Kreuzen Highway entrance).
*   **Female Student:** Station Street (center of map).
3.  Exit to **North Kreuzen Highway**. Find the kitten at the north end.
*   *Note:* The fishing spot here is blocked until Act 2.
4.  Return to Bareahard and speak to the cat again for a scene with Celine.

blocks.name: St. Veronica's Tears
blocks.content:
1.  Go to **Bareahard Cathedral** (Central Plaza, north end). Speak to **Sister Tatiana** (west room).
2.  Examine the statue at the center of the plaza.
3.  Go to **Station Street**, take east stairs to **Underground Waterway**.
4.  **Underground Waterway 1:** Follow east path to northwest corner. Open chest for **Green Pendulum**, press switch to unlock gate.
5.  **Underground Waterway 2:** Go north for Sepith. Take west path to center for a boss fight.
**Boss: Abyss Drome** (and 7 Sludge Dromes)
*   **HP:** 88,111
*   **Strategy:** Dromes cast high-damage magic. Use **Impede** crafts to cancel casting (Tactic Bonus). If too dangerous, wipe mobs with S-Crafts. The boss weakens ADF; cancel its arts to prevent massive damage.
*   *New Game+:* Find **Black Records #3** in the Abyss Drome area after the fight.

1.  Go to **Noble District** and approach **Duke Albarea Mansion** for a scene.
2.  Visit **Sorciere Restaurant** and speak to **Hammond**.
3.  Head to **Station Street**, take south exit to **Bareahard Airport**.
    *   *Warning:* This advances the story. Ensure all side activities are done.
blocks.heading: Conclusion of Bareahard

blocks.content:
1.  **Hold (Downstairs):** Find **Freeze** quartz.
2.  **3F (Lounge):** Play the racing mini-game.
    *   **Boss: Jusis** (19,500 HP). Beating him gives **2 AP**. Retry if you lose.
3.  **Boss Battle:** Face **Duvalie** and **McBurn**.
    *   **Duvalie:** 84,208 HP. **McBurn:** 256,800 HP.
    *   **Bonus Condition:** Defeat Duvalie before McBurn destroys you to get **3 Extra AP**.
    *   **Strategy:** Buff strength, spam S-Crafts on Duvalie. Use Zeram Powder to revive for 100 CP if needed. Scan enemies.
    *   **Outcome:** Alternate scene if Duvalie falls. Followed by an unwinnable mech battle.

**Mech Battle: Hector & Armored Vehicle NP-II**
*   **Strategy:** Defeat the **Armored Vehicle** first (lowest HP). It has 3-star unbalance weakness in attack stance. Then focus on **Hector** (Attack head in idle stance, body in attack stance).
*   **Reward:** Save point, followed by a hot spring scene. Choose a partner for **600 Link Exp**.
blocks.heading: Bareahard Airport & Airship

blocks.content:
This is the only day with double bonding events. You have **7 bonding points**.
*   **Goal:** Attend events for **Alisa, Emma, Fie, Laura, Millium, Sharon** to add profile pages.
*   **Gaius:** Attending his event teaches **Hunter Wing** (instead of reaching Link Level 75).
*   **Snowboard:** New difficulty level. Clear it for **Passion Leggings** and a new snowboard.
*   **Ymir Valley:** New monster **Icicle Penguin** (scan for trophy).

**Guest Character Bonus:**
Guest characters (Claire, Sharon, Toval) with the highest Link EXP (Link Level 3) at the end of Act 1 grant a powerful accessory for Chapter 2.
blocks.heading: Bonding Events

blocks.content: **New Game+:** Exchange 50 U-Materials for a **Zemurian Ore Shard** at the General Store.

blocks.name: Stranger than Fishin
blocks.content:
Head to the **Tavern** and speak to **Gerald** behind the counter. Accept his request and leave town by going to **Ymir Valley**. Keep going until you reach **Ymir Valley 2**.
Speak to **Annabelle**, who is located at the center of the map. Now fish at the bridge; once you successfully catch the fish, there will be a boss battle.
**Boss: Icy Croaker**
*   **HP:** 68,100
*   **Elemental Efficacy:** Earth (120), Water (60), Fire (160), Wind (90)
*   **Unbalance Efficacy:** Slash (★☆☆☆), Thrust (★★☆☆), Pierce (☆☆☆☆), Strike (★★★☆)
*   **Strategy:** This is a really easy boss due to its poor Faint and Sleep resistance. You can easily inflict status ailments on it. The boss only hits single targets, so there isn't anything specific to watch out for.
**Rewards:**
*   **Items:** Effort quartz, Prankster quartz (both helpful for cooking)
*   **Mira:** 2,000
*   **AP:** 4

When you have finished all the activities listed above, **save your game** and head to your room to end the day. The game will accumulate all the AP you have earned. You will get an **S-Rank** if you manage to get a total of **41 AP**.

**AP Breakdown:**
blocks.heading: Ending the Day & AP Summary
Data
rows: Found and explored the Aqua Shrine

blocks.name: Rufus
blocks.heading: Boss: Rufus
blocks.strategy:
This is an **unwinnable** boss fight. However, to fulfill the bonus condition for the extra **3 AP**, you must reduce the boss's HP to **below 50% within 40 turns**.
Challenge:** The boss has exceptionally high defense, rendering regular attacks almost ineffective.
Best Approach:** Enhance your party with **Jusis's buffs** and unleash a barrage of **S-Crafts**. If your CP is depleted, resort to using Arts.
Warning:** If Rufus manages to cast his Arts, it can deal a devastating **17,000 damage** to each party member, instantly K.O.ing them. It is crucial to have a character capable of **canceling his Art casting** to prevent this.
Outcome:** After inflicting substantial damage, the boss will employ his S-Craft to instantly decimate your entire party.
Following this encounter, you'll engage in another **mech battle**, but it is also unwinnable. After this fight, the chapter will conclude.

**Boss:** Rufus
*   **HP:** 128,640
*   **Item Drop:** None
*   **Elemental Efficacy:** Earth (90), Water (90), Fire (90), Wind (90)
*   **Unbalance Efficacy:** Slash (☆☆☆☆), Thrust (☆☆☆☆), Pierce (☆☆☆☆), Strike (★☆☆☆)

blocks.content: After you have finished the event scene, visit each room. They are all marked with a **red exclamation mark** on the map.

- **Scarlet** – South Area (Southeast Room)
- **Vulcan** – South Area (Northeast Room)
- **Bleublanc** – Dining Table (Center)
- **Xeno & Leonidas** – North Area (Southeast Room)
- **McBurn** – North Area (Northeast Room)
- **Duvalie** – North Area (Southwest Room)
- **Altina** – North Area (Northwest Room)
blocks.heading: Characters to Visit

blocks.content:
After speaking with everyone listed above:
1. Move to the **second floor** and go **north** to the guest room.
2. Knock on the door and watch the event.
3. **Rean** will obtain the **Spirit Unification** ability.
4. Head downstairs to your room (**South Area, Southwest corner**).
5. Examine the **air ducts** by the flower vase.
6. Proceed to the end to face a series of battles.
blocks.heading: Spirit Unification & Air Ducts

blocks.content: *Location: Air Ducts*
blocks.heading: Battle: Alliance Forces Soldiers

blocks.content:
**Strategy:**
> These soldiers deal significant damage and can heal themselves with arts.
> - Use **Alfin's arts** to destroy them in roughly three blows.
> - Cancel the Soldier's casting with **Rean's Autumn Leaf Cutter**.
> - Keep Rean's HP high; use Alfin to heal if he drops low.

**Additional Enemies in Area:**

**Treasures Found:**
- **Celestial Balm** (West Room)
- **Orange Cape** (East Room)
- **Tearal Balm** (East Room)

blocks.name: Duvalie & Bleublanc
blocks.heading: Boss: Duvalie & Bleublanc
blocks.strategy: *Location: After the air ducts, near the Orbment Charging Station*

blocks.content:
**Strategy:**
- Scan both bosses immediately.
- You only need to reduce **50% of either boss's health** to win.
- An **S-Craft** will deal nearly enough damage to finish the fight.
- Follow up with regular attacks to end the battle.

blocks.name: Crow
blocks.heading: Boss: Crow
blocks.strategy:
Exchange attacks with Crow.
If you see a **turn order bonus** (e.g., Critical), use your **S-Craft** immediately.
**Warning:** When Crow's HP drops below **50%**, ensure your HP is **higher than 7,000**. He may use his S-Craft, which can instantly kill you if your HP is too low.

*Location: Final room of the chapter*

blocks.content: > **Critical Opening Tip:** Watch the opening sequence; the guest character with the highest Link EXP (Must be level 3) will give you a powerful accessory.

blocks.heading: Data
rows: Attacks/Craft can cancel arts (90% chance). Delay +6

blocks.content:
> **Party Assembly:** Read the quest list at the computer terminal. **Gaius** is a mandatory member.
> **Fresh Nightmare Mode Tip:** If you need to use the Tri-colored Onigiri trick, use Emma.
> **Resource Management:** From now on, spend your mira and sepith only on the four characters you intend to take with you to face the Act boss. Do not invest in support characters unless you plan to use them. Swap equipment and quartz among support characters to ensure they gain experience. This minimizes expense while keeping gear updated. When the story requires specific characters, simply transfer their armor, boots, and quartz. Save as much mira and sepith as possible until further notice.

Explore the airship. The **Courageous** will be your new base of operation. Visit locations marked with a **red exclamation mark**.

*   **1st Floor:** Speak to George and Valimar. After this event, Rean can use his Spirit Unification at the cost of 100 CP.
*   **2nd Floor (Cafeteria):** Speak to Millium for a short event. Play the **Blade Mini Game** in the leisure room (regardless of win/loss, playing raises Link EXP by 100 for the first 5 rounds).
*   **Royal Room:** Visit Princess Alfin.
blocks.heading: December 15: The Courageous

blocks.content:
*Note: Not all facilities are available yet. You need to recruit Thors Academy Students to unlock functions.*

*   **5th Floor - Bridge:**
    *   **Computer Terminal:** Hub for quests, reporting, and student intel.
    *   **Captain Towa:** Rearrange party, move destinations, or progress the main storyline.
*   **4th Floor - Assembly Area:**
    *   **Royal Room:** Speak to Alfin to receive parts of the **Phoenix Chapter** (medals based on achievements).
    *   **Training Facility:** Fight enemies under conditions for U-Materials and Master Quartz.
*   **3rd Floor - Shop Area:**
    *   **Weapon/Item Shop:** NPC Casper.
    *   **Accessory Shop:** NPC Colette.
    *   **Premium Products:** NPC Hugo.
    *   **Radio Sweepstakes:** NPC Munk (Lottery system).
    *   **Recipe Gift:** Offer recipes to Bridget for rewards.
*   **2nd Floor - Cafeteria/Multipurpose Area:**
    *   Club area (Fishing, Literature, etc.).
    *   **Blade Mini Game:** Increases Link EXP (first 5 rounds only).
*   **1st Floor - Engineering Area:**
    *   **Engineering:** Synthesize new quartz with George.
    *   **Hangar:** Customize Orbal Bike. (Later: Clara unlocks EX-Orb function for Valimar).

After exploring, speak to **Towa** to recruit missing students. Destinations: **Ymir, Proving Ground, Garrelia Fortress, Nord Highlands, Legram**. This guide starts with **Garrelia Camp**.
blocks.heading: Courageous's Outline

blocks.content:
Select **Proving Ground** (middle right of world map). Bring **Laura** to your party.
*   **Store Area:** Speak to **Monica** to recruit her.
    *   *Role:* Found on 3rd Floor. If you give her Supreme Dishes, she rewards items. Cook every Supreme Dish for a rare quartz.
*   **Center of Camp:** Speak to **Rex** to add his profile to the Notebook.
*   **Officer Virginie:** Lady by the truck. She teaches the **Tomato Burger Recipe**.
*   **Headquarters (East Exit):** Speak to **General Craig** to start the side quest.
blocks.heading: Proving Ground

blocks.name: Without Leave
blocks.content:
1.  Head to **Garrelia Camp Headquarters**. Speak to General Craig and accept the request.
2.  Gather info from NPCs marked with **green exclamation marks**:
*   Lunch table (Southeast corner).
*   Clerks (Resting area).
*   Clerks (Store area).
3.  Speak to the soldier near the **west gate exit**.
4.  Head to **Garrelia Fortress - Ruins**.
5.  Speak to Soldiers near the tank (west side, near Garrelia Byroad exit).
6.  Head to the east end near the **crater**. An event occurs, ending the quest.
*   *Note:* No monsters here. Use the **Orbal Bike** (Press Square).
*   **Treasure Chests:**
*   Adamant Shield (Garrelia Fortress)
*   Sepith Mass x400
*   Crystal Flood
*   **Trial Chest (Southwest Corner):** Defeat the boss to unlock **Overdrive** for **Fie** and **Sara**.
*   *Boss:* Huge Rat & Dirty Rats.
*   *Strategy:* Use full CP and S-Crafts, or Sara's Arts (boss has poor magic defense).
**Post-Quest Event:** A giant monster (**Cryptid**) appears near the crater.
*   *Warning:* Recommended for Level 100. Possible at Level 75+ with correct setup.
*   *Reward:* Special quartz for **Lost Arts**.
*   *Strategy:* Best to hunt on N3 run when Jusis is Lv 81 (Platinum Shield) or wait until all 5 are available (Ch 2-3).

1.  Exit to **Garrelia Byroad 2** (East).
2.  Travel to **Garrelia Byroad 1**.
3.  Go to the **northeast corner** (Trial Chest location) to find **Emily** and **Nicolas**.
4.  Recruit them and help install the **relay machine** (6 points total: 3 on Byroad 1, 3 on Byroad 2).
5.  Report to Emily and Nicolas, then return to Courageous.
blocks.heading: Garrelia Byroad

blocks.content:
Return to Courageous, speak to **Towa**, and set destination to **Legram** (bottom of map).
*   **General Store:** Buy **Imperial Chronicle Issue #4** and **Gambler Jack Reprint #8**.
blocks.heading: Preparation

blocks.content:
*   **Chapel (Right Room):** Speak to **Vivi** (Need **Fie** in party to convince her).
*   **Training Hall (Left Room):** Speak to **Casper** (Need **Imperial Chronicle Issue #4**).
*   **Bracer Guild:** Event with Miles.
*   **Aprikoze Inn:** Start side quest.
blocks.heading: Recruitment

blocks.name: Badass in Danger!!!
blocks.content:
1.  Speak to the **green-haired boy** at Aprikoze Inn.
2.  Find **Patiry** in **Ymir** (speak to Luke, the station guard by the pub).
3.  Return to Courageous, travel to **Ymir**.
4.  Speak to Patiry near the station guard to finish.
*   *Reward:* Bunny Watch, 3000 Mira, 4 AP.

Return to Courageous, travel to **Ymir** (Northern section).
*   **General Store:** Buy **Gambler Jack Reprint #9** and **Crunchy Rice Cracker** recipe.
*   **Activities:** New Snow Board course, fish in Ymir Valley.
blocks.heading: Ymir

blocks.content:
1.  Speak to Towa, destination **Zender Gate** (Top right).
2.  Enter Zender Gate, head north to **Tank Officer Hoover**. Get **Gambler Jack II - Chapter 8**.
3.  Leave Zender Gate. Find **Beryl** at the stone monument (Northwest corner).
    *   *Note:* If missed, she appears in Legram (Dec 19) or Terra Shrine (Dec 23).
4.  Use Quick Navigation to **Watchtower**.
5.  Speak to **Mint** (first choice to help). Examine key points (red exclamation marks) on every floor.
6.  Head to the **rooftop** for an event. Mint joins Courageous.
blocks.heading: Zender Gate & Watchtower

blocks.name: Find Our First Years
blocks.content:
Recruit the following students to finish:
*   Monica (Garrelia Proving Ground)
*   Vivi (Legram Chapel)
*   Casper (Legram Training Hall)
*   Mint (Watchtower)
**Completion:** Return to Courageous, Bridge (5F), Computer Terminal, select 2nd option.
*   *Reward:* Sepith Mass x400, 2500 Mira, 4 AP.

1.  Speak to Towa, destination **Lake Lacrima**.
2.  **General Store:** Buy **Gambler Jack Reprint #7**.
3.  Speak to **Sheeda** for **Hearty Milk Hotpot** recipe.

**Story Quest: Monster Madness**
1.  **Cabin:** Speak to Elder Ivan or Gwen.
2.  **Nord Highlands - North:** Find quest monster near fishing spot (Northeast).
    *   *Boss:* Magic Knight Ortheim (91808 HP).
    *   *Strategy:* Full party. Spam S-Crafts when HP is low to prevent healing.
3.  **Reward:** Sepith Mass x400, 2500 AP (Note: Text says AP, likely meant Mira or AP), 4 AP.
blocks.heading: Lake Lacrima & Monster Madness

blocks.content:
1.  Go to **Nord Highlands - North**, use Quick Nav to **Ancient Quarry**.
2.  **Entrance:** EP Charge II.
3.  Speak to **Clara** (First choice) to explore.
4.  **Center (Path Split):** Trial Chest for **Emma, Fie, Gaius, Jusis**.
    *   *Boss:* Alpha Diglem x2 & Diglem x4.
    *   *Reward:* Unlock Overdrive for these characters.
5.  **South End:** Outside area. **Volcanic Rain** Quartz.
6.  **North Path:** **Pandora** Master Quartz (Monster Chest).
7.  **East:** U-Materials.
8.  **North End:** Boss Fight.
    *   *Boss:* **Ginosha-Zanak** (Giant Spider).
    *   *Note:* Returning boss from CS, weakened. Summons minions (max 4).
    *   *Strategy:* Status ailments (Confused, Sleep, Faint) work well.
    *   *Reward:* Clara joins Courageous.
    *   *New Features:* EX-Orb function for Valimar, **Awakener's Call** ability.
    *   *New Game+ Only:* Return to boss spot to find **Black Records #1**.

**End of Day:**
1.  Report status at Computer Terminal (Bridge).
2.  Speak to Towa, select **"Commence Operation"**.

> **Nightmare Tip:** If you got Sharon's **Black Virtue**, equip it on Rean permanently. Combined with Impede 1-2, it makes Arc Slash incredibly effective.
blocks.heading: Ancient Quarry

blocks.content: **Party Setup:** **Eliot** and **Sara** are mandatory. No turning back after selection.
blocks.heading: December 17: Twin Dragons Bridge

blocks.content:
Face three mechs. Focus on defeating one at a time.
*   **Spiegel (Spear):** Backlines (buffs). Force to front by killing others. Weakness: Body.
*   **Hector:** Weakness: Head (Idle), Body (Attack).
*   **Drakkhen:** Weakness: Arms (Both stances).
*   *Strategy:* Save Brave points/CP for the second unit. Heal if HP < 35k-40k.
blocks.heading: Mech Battle

blocks.content:
*   **2F:**
    *   Right Room: **EP Charge III**.
    *   Center -> West Duct: **Flood** Quartz (Monster Chest).
    *   Center -> East Path -> Southwest Duct: **Curia Balm**.
    *   Center -> East Path -> East End: **Ebony Boots**.
    *   Southeast Corner: Upstairs.
*   **3F:**
    *   West Side (via duct): Second Room -> **Tearal Balm**.
    *   Southeast Corner (break boxes): **Yggdrasil** Quartz.
    *   Center -> Left Treasure: **Ebony Vest**.
    *   Right Duct: Downstairs.
    *   East Duct: Back to 3F.
    *   North Stairs: Up to 4F.
*   **4F:**
    *   North Room: **Sepith x200**.
    *   Center: Heal, then fight boss.

**Boss:** Kaiser Doven B & Kaiser Doven R.
*   *Strategy:* Easy. Use Eliot's **Resounding Beat** to heal. Wipe out summoned mobs immediately.
blocks.heading: Twin Dragons Bridge Exploration

blocks.content:
*   **Grand Market:**
    *   Speak to **Gibson** (First shop, left): **Comforting Cappuccino** recipe.
    *   **Cornette** (Center): Buy **Gambler Jack Reprint #10**.
    *   **Marco** (West end): Get **Gambler Jack II - Chapter 9**.
*   **West End House:** Speak to **Becky** to recruit (2 AP now, 1 AP later).
*   **Inns/Chapel:** Speak to Margot (Weathercock Inn) and Rosine (Chapel) for free consumables.
*   **Bonding Events:** Attend events for Elliot, Emma, Jusis, Sara, Towa to update profiles.
    *   *Locations:* Market Manager's House (Alfin), South End (Alisa), Grand Market (Elliot, Towa), West End (Emma, Jusis), Weathercock Inn (Fie, Laura, Sara), Weapon Shop (Machias), Chapel (Millium), Near Entrance (Gaius).
blocks.heading: Activities

blocks.content:
Take the **East Exit** of Celdic.
*   **S Rank Requirement:** Total **36 AP** for the Act.
blocks.heading: Ending the Day

blocks.content:
*   Rescued Fiona: 8
*   Recruited Monica: 1
*   Recruited Mint: 1
*   Recruited Casper: 1
*   Recruited Vivi: 1
*   Recruited Emily: 2
*   Recruited Nicolas: 2
*   Recruited Clara: 2
*   Recruited Becky: 2

*   Quest: Find Our First Years: 4
*   Quest: Without Leave: 4
*   Quest: Badass in Danger!: 4
*   **Total:** 36 AP
blocks.heading: AP Checklist

blocks.content:
**Preparation & Initial Steps**
*   Read the quest list on the computer terminal.
*   **Party Selection:** **Millium** is mandatory for this Act.
*   **Becky:** If recruited, she allows item exchange (Pawnshop feature).
*   **Valimar Upgrade:** Sacrifice **1 Attack 2** and **1 Action 2** quartz plus **20 U-Materials** to get the corresponding Ex-Orb for Valimar. This is advisable for the tough Mech battles ahead.
*   **Resource Management:** Spend Mira and Sepith only on the 4 main party members you intend to use for the Act boss. Rotate support characters to gain EXP without upgrading their gear. Swap armor/quartz if the story forces specific characters. Save resources until further notice.

**Activities**
1.  Head to the **Front Deck (3F)**.
    *   Speak to **Celine** (updates profile).
    *   Speak to **Alfin** to receive the **Medal of Charity**.
    *   Play **Blade** with friends to raise Link EXP.
    *   Speak to **Millium** and **Jusis** for a short event.
2.  Speak to **Towa**. The **Celdic** region is added to Courageous Destinations.
    *   **New Cryptids:** Found in *Lunaria Nature Park* and *Nord Highlands - South*. Defeat them now or later.
3.  Visit **Ymir**.
    *   **General Store:** Purchase the **Cheese Fondue Recipe Book**.
    *   **Snow Board Mini-Game:** A new obstacle has been added.
    *   **The Phoenix Wings:** Speak to receptionist **Baggins** to start the side quest.
blocks.heading: December 19

blocks.name: Creeping for Creeps
blocks.content:
*   **Objective:** In the snowboard mini-game, catch two snow sheep.
*   **Rewards:** **2 Bonus AP**, 500 Sepith Mass, 3,500 Mira, and 3 AP (Total 6 AP if successful).
*   **Note:** You can retry until successful. A mini-boss appears after catching them.
*   *Mini-Boss Tip:* Use S-Crafts or summon Valimar if the battle is too difficult (freezes party, high single-target damage).

**Proving Ground & Twin Dragons Bridge**
1.  **Courageous:** Speak to **Towa**, select **Proving Ground**.
2.  **Proving Ground:** Speak to **Munk** (eating table, Southeast) to help find his sticker.
3.  **Courageous:** Equip Valimar with **Attack 1-2** and **Action 1** Ex-Orbs.
4.  **Twin Dragons Bridge:** Select as destination.
    *   Enter the **Command Room** (North door, same as Chapter 2 Act 1 boss).
    *   Speak to **General Craig** to retrieve Munk's Sticker.
    *   Speak to **Captain Gaul** (left) to learn **Seafood Salad** recipe.
    *   Speak to **Fiona** for a scene.
    *   **Examine the bookshelf** to get **Hot Colour** for your Orbal Bike.
5.  **Mech Duel:** Speak to **Major Neithardt** (Southwest, by Panzer Soldat) to accept the quest.
blocks.heading: December 20

blocks.name: I'll Make a Mech Out of You
blocks.content:
*   **Objective:** Defeat Major Neithardt in a mech duel.
*   **Rewards:** **2 Extra AP**, Skill Handbook, 3,500 Mira, 3 AP (Total 5 AP), Munk's Profile Page 1.
*   **Strategy:** Neithardt hits hard (15k-17k idle, 34k-37k attack stance). Use **Morning Moon** to evade or keep a healer ready. When HP is low, he uses a sword stance with a 50k-60k attack. Reload and retry if you fail.
**Loot & Exploration**
*   **Twin Dragons Bridge - Central Area:** Find **Flare Bomb** quartz.
*   **Twin Dragons Bridge - Garrelia Side:** Find **Yellow Pendulum** and **Sepith Mass**.
*   *New Monster:* **Metal Beetle** (available after Dec 18).
*   **Garrelia Byroad 1 (Under Bridge):** Clear the **Trial Chest** to unlock Overdrive for **Laura, Machias, Gaius, and Sara**.
*   *Boss:* Giga Ashen Pom x2. Weak to area attacks.
#### Story Quest: Just Getting Wormed Up
1.  Go to **Garrelia Byroad 2** (Southeast from Byroad 1).
2.  Defeat the monster in the **southwest corner**.
*   *Boss:* Abyss Worm x6. Use S-Crafts and Valimar.
3.  **Rewards:** Poison 2, 2,500 Mira, 4 AP.
**Recruitment & New Features**
1.  **Courageous:** Return to speak to **Towa**, then go to **Proving Ground**.
*   Return sticker to **Munk**. He joins the ship, unlocking **Radio Sweepstakes**.
2.  **Celdic Region:**
*   **East Celdic Highway (Farm):** Meet **Paula**. Help her find the black horse (requires **Jusis** in party).
*   Find horse at **Lunaria Nature Park** (Northwest corner, Lunaria Nature Park 2).
*   **East Trista Highway:** Find **Alan** and **Loggins** (Southeast corner). Complete scouting request.
*   **North Kreuzen Highway 3:**
*   Northeast: Meet **Fidelio**. Accept request.
*   **Loot:** **Judgement Bolt** (behind Fidelio), **EP Charge III** (West end).
*   **Trial Chest (Southwest):** For **Jusis** and **Millium**.
*   *Boss:* Godlinoceros & Enduranoceros.
*   *Strategy:* Back row, Millium buffs Def/Ultimate Barrier, Jusis uses Fire Arts. Equip Faint prevention for Jusis.
*   **East Celdic Highway 3:** Find **Dorothee** (Need **Emma** in party). Defeat black sheep to finish Fidelio's request.
3.  **Courageous:**
*   Speak to **Dorothee** (2F Book Room) to update profile.
*   Report status at the computer terminal.
*   Speak to **Towa** (Red option) to end the day.

**Roer Infiltration**
*   **Party:** **Alisa** and **Rean** are mandatory. You cannot switch later.
*   **Trial Chests:** You can only access **two** of the three available. Recommended:
    1.  **Spina Byroad** (Alisa & Emma)
    2.  **Sachsen Mountain Path** (Eliot & Gaius)

**Spina Byroad**
*   Check fishing spot near boat.
*   Follow linear path to **Trial Chest**.
    *   *Requirement:* **Alisa** and **Emma**.
    *   *Boss:* Ghost Tomartian.
    *   *Strategy:* Equip **Confuse resistance**. Use S-Craft immediately. Fire arts effective.
*   **Loot:** **Celestial Balm**, **Crescent Mirror** (West end).
*   Head east to **Roer**.

**Roer Activities**
*   Visit Key Locations (Red !): **Hugo** (RF Store), **Linde** (General Goods), **Cathedral**, **Instructor Mary** (Residence #1), **Airport**.
*   **Dvance's Diner:** Visit.
*   **General Store:** Buy **Gambler Jack Reprint #11-12**.
*   **Nortia Highway:**
    *   *West Area (Highway 1):* 3 chests (**Tearal Balm**, **Athelas**, Sepith).
    *   *Highway 2:* **Aries Master Quartz** (SE path monster chest), **Nightmare** quartz (North), U-Materials (South).
    *   *Trial Chest (Center path):* Requires **Eliot, Emma, Millium, Sara**.
        *   *Boss:* Pudgy Penguin x2. Weak to Fire and Confuse.
    *   *Highway 3:* **EP Charge III** (Center), **EP Cut 2** (Northwest), **Phantom Phobia** (North, near Ignis Shrine).
    *   **Schwarz Drache Barrier:** Go SW exit (Rewards **2 AP**). Speak to **Margarita**.
*   **Sachsen Mountain Path:**
    *   *North/Northeast:* **Suzaku** Quartz (Monster Chest).
    *   *West:* **Celestial Balm**.
    *   *South:* **Red Pendulum**.
    *   *Path 2 (Northwest Exit):* **Dragon Skin Boots** (West), **Cross Crusade** quartz (SW), **Tearal Balm** (NE).
    *   **Trial Chest (Northwest):** Requires **Eliot** and **Gaius**.
        *   *Boss:* Master Cyron.
        *   *Strategy:* Equip **Freeze resistance**. Gaius uses S-Craft on mobs, Hunter Wing on boss. Eliot heals.
*   **Iron Mines:** Fight Jaegers -> West Exit (Jaegers) -> Train (Fight rooms) -> Northwest Exit to **RF Building**.

**RF Building**
*   **5F:** **Celestial Balm** (SE room), **Sepith Mass** (West room), **Dragon Skin Jumpsuit** (SE corner).
*   **12F (Elevator):** **Grim Butterfly** quartz (North), **EP Charge III** (Left room), **Curia Balm** (Center path, right room), **Dark Pendulum** (SE room).
*   **20F (Elevator):** **Sepith** (North), **Tearal Balm** (SW path), **Black Bell** quartz (SE room).
    *   **Unlock Room:** Examine computer in SW room to unlock NW room.
    *   **Katze Master Quartz:** Found in the newly unlocked NW room.
*   **23F (Elevator):** Heal, Save, then Boss.
blocks.heading: December 21

blocks.name: Regenenkopf Type-0
blocks.heading: Boss: Regenenkopf Type-0
blocks.strategy:
*   **Preparation:** **Rean** with Canceller Set. Equip **Confuse resistance** (Alisa: True Gladiator Belt). Link Rean & Alisa.
*   **Strategy:**
1.  Defeat **Shigure** adds first (they heal/buff boss).
2.  Boss is weak to status down. Use AT Delay (Rean's Arc Slash + Alisa's Heaven's Gift).
3.  At 25% HP, boss heals and gains Insight. Use S-Crafts to burst it down.
**Post-Boss**
*   Save and change Ex-Orbs.
*   **Critical:** Equip **Attack 1-2** and **Action 1** Ex-Orbs only. (Important for N3 Run).

blocks.name: Goliath
blocks.heading: Boss: Goliath
blocks.strategy:
*   **Strategy:** Watch attack patterns. Use **Morning Moon** to evade Gatling/Arm attacks. Keep CP/EP high.
*   **Sara:** Use **Thundering Roar** to debuff boss, making it very easy.

blocks.content:
**Bonding & Final Activities**
*   You have **5 Bonding Points**.
*   **Recommended:** Attend **Alisa**, **Alfin** (pick up **Dark Colour** from shelf near her), **Laura**, or **Millium** to update profiles (Adds Page 2 to their profiles, +500 Link EXP each).
*   **Instructor Mary:** Visit **Roer Residence #1 (2F, Southeast)** to add Page 1 to her profile.
*   **Dining Bar (F):** Speak to **Grand** (orange hair) to learn **Sweet Blue** recipe.
*   **General Store:** Buy the latest **Imperial Chronicles**.
*   **Linde** or **Vivi** (General Store area).
*   **Dvance Diner:** Speak to **Logg** (counter) for **Gambler Jack II - Chapter 10**.

**Bonding Event Locations (Bonus Link EXP +500)**
*   **Alisa:** RF Building 24F (Page 1)
*   **Alfin:** RF Building 24F (Page 2)
*   **Gaius:** West Exit
*   **Eliot:** Near Escalator
*   **Emma:** Near Station
*   **Fie:** Roer Airport
*   **Jusis:** East Exit
*   **Laura:** RF Store (Page 2)
*   **Machias:** Near Elevator Entrance
*   **Millium:** Near Station (Page 2)
*   **Sara:** Repair Shop (Jackass)
*   **Towa:** Dvance Diner

**End of Day**
*   Go to **Roer Airport**.
*   Enter the **Courageous** (Northeast corner).
*   The game accumulates all earned AP for the chapter.
blocks.heading: December 22

blocks.content:
*   Infiltrated Roer: 8 AP
*   Visited Schwarz Drache Barrier: 2 AP
*   Recruited Munk: 2 AP
*   Recruited Paula: 2 AP
*   Recruited Alan: 2 AP
*   Recruited Loggins: 2 AP
*   Recruited Fiedelio: 2 AP
*   Recruited Dorothee: 2 AP
*   Recruited Linde: 2 AP
*   Recruited Angelica: 2 AP
*   Quest: I'll Make a Mech Out of You: 3 + 2 AP (Total 5 AP)
*   Quest: Just Getting Wormed Up: 4 AP
*   Quest: Creeping for Creeps: 3 + 2 AP (Total 5 AP)
blocks.heading: AP Summary (Act 2 Part 2)

blocks.content: When you regain control, speak to **Towa** twice on the Bridge. A list of new locations will be added, such as **Eisengard Range** and **Roer Region**.
blocks.heading: December 23

blocks.content:
*   **4th Floor (Training Facility):** Speak to **Emily** and **Alan** to update their character profiles. You can also speak to **Alfin** for a short event.
*   **2nd Floor:** Speak to **Dorothee** and purchase the **"Pasta"** recipe.
*   **1st Floor:** Speak to **Angelica** to update her profile.
*   **Blade:** Play some Blade with friends to build Link EXP.
blocks.heading: Initial Actions

blocks.content: **Note:** The final two **Cryptids** will appear: one in **Nortia Highway 2** and one in **Eisengard Mountain 2**.

blocks.name: The Sweetest of Challenges
blocks.content:
Head to the **Infirmary** (2nd Floor) and examine the card on the desk to start the quest.
1.  Class VII gathers in the meeting room. Listen to everyone's opinions and repeat them.
2.  **Select the Culprit:** Choose **Machias** (2nd choice) to earn **2 extra AP**.
*   *Note: Picking Emma gives only 1 AP on the latest Japanese patch.*
3.  **Rewards:** Thief Cloak, 3500 Mira, 3 (+1-2) AP.
#### Recruiting Remaining Students
1.  **Roer:**
*   Obtain any missing Trial Chests from the previous act.
*   Go to **RF Store**, speak to **Hugo**, and accept his request.
*   Leave Roer, go to **Legram**, and speak to **Watteau** at Watteau's Store.
*   Go to **Ymir's General Store** and speak to **Lio**.
*   Visit the **snowboard area** (new course added).
*   Return to **Roer** and speak to **Hugo** again. He joins the *Courageous* and opens the premium store.
2.  **Roer Institute of Technology (Northwest Building 2F):**
*   Speak to **Ratto** (top corner) and accept his request.
*   Leave town via **Nortia Highway 2**.
*   Head to the **southwest corner** to find **Stefan**.
*   **Requirement:** Bring **Machias** in your party to trigger an event battle.
*   *Optional:* Fight the Cryptid **Agnagarn** on the southeast end of Nortia Highway 2.
3.  **Nortia Highway 3:**
*   Go to the fishing spot (northwest of the map) and speak to **Kenneth**.
*   Accept his request and catch a **Glutinous Bass** at the spot beside him.
*   Speak to Kenneth again; he joins the *Courageous*.
4.  **Schwarz Drache Barrier (Southwest exit of Nortia Highway 3):**
*   Speak to **Rex** near the gate to update his bio and receive *Gambler Jack II - Chapter 11*.
*   Enter the resting area and speak to **Margarita** (with **Millium** in party). She joins the *Courageous*.
*   *Tip:* Giving Margarita every **Peculiar Dish** rewards rare items and a rare quartz.
*   Speak to the lady by the counter to learn the **"Tomato Stew"** recipe.
*   Return to **Courageous** (Cafeteria) and speak to **Nicholas** to update his profile.
5.  **Eisengard Range:**
*   Return to the Bridge, speak to Towa, and set destination to **Eisengard Range**.
#### Side Quest: Gone Air
1.  Watch the event scene (automatic fight with two Jaegers).
2.  You arrive in the airship from the end of Chapter 1.
*   **Northwest corner:** Pick up **Freeze Quartz** (if missed previously).
3.  **Lobby Room:** Fight a group of Jaegers.
4.  **Northwest Room:** Defeat a single Jaeger to get **Card Key 1**.
5.  **3rd Floor (Southeast entrance):** Defeat four Jaegers to get **Card Key 2**.
6.  **4th Floor (South entrance):** Defeat five Jaegers to finish the quest.
*   **Rewards:** **Klein** and **Hibelle** join the *Courageous*.
*   *2nd Playthrough+:* Speak to **Norton** at **Roer's Airport** to receive *Black Records #4*.
7.  Return to *Courageous* and speak to **Klein** on the Bridge to update his profile.
#### Eisengard Mountains & Trial Chests
*   Revisit **Eisengard Mountains** landing spot for a **Trial Chest** (Fie & Laura).
*   Clearing it unlocks their **Overdrive Function**.
*   *Boss:* **Rolling Rock** (HP: 42,809). Weak to Faint.
*   New enemies appear: Shadow Dancer, Venom Demon, Steel Golem.
*   **Final Cryptid:** **Lindbaum** (located where you start a new game).
#### Side Quest: Kreuzen for a Bruisin'
1.  Return to *Courageous*, speak to Towa, and set destination to **Celdic**.
2.  Go to **East Celdic Highway 2** -> **North Kreuzen Highway 3**.
3.  Find the quest monster at the **southwest end**.
*   **Boss:** **Abearddon** (HP: 132,446).
You must revisit all Shrines. **Emma** must be in your party to access new trial areas. Shrines are marked with a red exclamation mark. Clear one to trigger a story event; the rest can be done later.
blocks.heading: Shrine Trials Part A

blocks.content:
*   **Entrance:** Speak to **Beryl** to update her profile.
*   **Mechanics:**
    *   Use warp device. Emma unlocks the gate.
    *   **Wall 1:** Hit with someone having **Strike Proficiency B+** (Laura, Millium, Machias) to create a bridge.
    *   **Wall 2:** Hit near an enemy to create a bridge.
*   **Treasures:**
    *   Earth Sepith, Ancient Glyph, Tear All Balm, Genbu Quartz (Monster Chest), Earth Bell Quartz.
    *   **Trial Chests:** Alisa/Fie and Machias/Millium.
        *   *Boss (Alisa/Fie):* Minos Lord + Minos Demons. (Weak to Faint).
        *   *Boss (Machias/Millium):* Dino Slug + Dissolution Slugs. (Weak to Faint).
*   **End:** Hit the final wall, cross to the boss room.
    *   **Boss:** Magic Knight Dire Wolf (see "End of 1st Shrine").
    *   **Reward:** Zemurian Crystal.
blocks.heading: Terra Shrine - Trial

blocks.content:
*   **Mechanics:** Requires **Piecing Proficiency B+** (Alisa, Fie, Machias, Sara) for switches.
*   **Treasures:**
    *   Ragna Vortex, Wind Bell, Celestial Balm EX, Wind Sepith, Zeus Gem (Monster Chest).
    *   **Trial Chests:** Fie/Millium and Jusis/Sara.
        *   *Boss (Fie/Millium):* Clay Doll Omega. (Use Evasion Tank strategy).
        *   *Boss (Jusis/Sara):* Heavy Stalker + Stone Stalkers. (Use Faint resistance and Wind Arts).
*   **Important:** Do not leave without the **Zeus Gem** (essential for Final Dungeon).
*   **End:** Complete the bridge, reach the boss room.
    *   **Reward:** Zemurian Crystal.
blocks.heading: Aria Shrine - Trial

blocks.content:
*   **Mechanics:** Requires **Thrust Proficiency B+** (Fie, Gaius, Jusis, Sara) to drain water.
*   **Treasures:**
    *   Maelstrom, Yaksha, Curia Balm, Water Bell, Water Sepith, EP Charge IV.
    *   **Trial Chests:** Alisa/Machias and Laura/Millium.
        *   *Boss (Laura/Millium):* Grand Ghastly + Gust Frogs. (High STR S-Crafts effective).
        *   *Boss (Alisa/Machias):* Gigantic Sharkodile. (Use Earth Pulse on Machias for regen).
*   **End:** Drain water, reach the boss room.
    *   **Reward:** Zemurian Crystal.
blocks.heading: Aqua Shrine - Trial

blocks.content:
*   **Mechanics:** Use **Rean's field attack** to extinguish flames and create bridges.
*   **Treasures:**
    *   Fire Sepith, Purgatorial Flame, Fire Bell, Carnage (Monster Chest).
    *   **Trial Chests:** Alisa/Sara and Machias/Emma.
        *   *Boss (Alisa/Sara):* Homuramikoto. (Impede to stop Flare Bomb; use Water Arts).
        *   *Boss (Machias/Emma):* Arch Geist. (Impede to stop Grim Butterfly; use Sleep/Nightmare resist).
*   **End:** Extinguish final flame, reach the boss room.
    *   **Reward:** Zemurian Crystal.
blocks.heading: Ignis Shrine - Trial

blocks.content:
*   **Boss:** **Magic Knight Dire Wolf** (HP: 156,170).
    *   Uses Ground Punch, Ground Smash, and Boost (cures 23k HP + buffs stats).
    *   *Strategy:* Focus on self-buffing or arts. Avoid prolonged battles due to healing.
*   **Post-Boss:** Leave the Shrine, speak to **George** (1F Courageous), and select the red option to advance the story.
blocks.heading: End of 1st Shrine

blocks.content:
*   **Fixed Party:** Jusis and Sara are fixed for the next segment.
*   **Events:** Survey key events in **Celdic**:
    1.  Chapel south room.
    2.  **Otto** (Manager House 2F).
    3.  **Claire** (Army Guardhouse entrance).
*   After all events, head to the **East exit of Celdic** for a cutscene.
*   **Back on Courageous:**
    *   Equip Valimar with best Ex-Orbs.
    *   Speak to **Fidelio** (Computer Room 2F), **Loggins** (Sword Training 4F), and **Linde** (Bridge 5F) to update profiles.
    *   Speak to **Towa** to start the operation.
blocks.heading: December 24 & 25

blocks.name: Kestrel
blocks.heading: Boss: Kestrel
blocks.strategy:
*   **HP:** 260,000.
*   **Strategy:** Similar to Spiegel. Save CP for counters or Seal (Last CP ability) when it switches stances.

blocks.content:
*   Fight a group of Jaegers with **Instructor Sara** only.
*   **Sara's S-Craft:** Use it when CP is full.
*   Proceed to **Aurochs Fort**.
blocks.heading: Post-Boss Event

blocks.content:
*   **Navigation:**
    *   **1F:** North path -> East -> South room (Curia Balm). Southwest (Cast 2). Northeast room (Celestial Balm EX). Air duct -> Southeast area (Hellfire Quartz).
    *   **2F:** North path -> Center gate -> Air duct (Chrono Burst Quartz). Southwest duct -> Southeast corner (Tearal Quartz). Northwest duct -> North section (HP 2 Quartz).
    *   **3F:** North path -> Northeast room (U-Materials).
*   **Boss:** **Duvalie** (HP: 203,010) + **Sleipnir x2**.
    *   *Strategy:* Kill Sleipnirs first with S-Crafts. Duvalie uses Prism Calibur (10k-13k dmg) below 60% HP. Use **Platinum Shield** (Jusis) or Adamantine Shield.
blocks.heading: Aurochs Fort

blocks.content:
*   **Alouette Inn (Artisan Street):**
    *   Speak to **Giolamo** (counter) -> Learn **Fruit Parfait** recipe.
    *   Speak to **Maicel** (table) -> Receive *Gambler Jack II - Chapter 12*.
*   **Duke's Mansion:**
    *   Event scene in the main hall.
    *   West room event.
    *   **Important:** Pick up **Windy Colour** from the drawer in **Jusis' room**.
*   **Bonding Events:**
    *   Attend bonding events for **Fie, Gaius, Machias, and Towa** to update profiles.
    *   Attend **Alfin's** event to unlock her final partner event on Dec 30.
    *   *Trophy Condition:* Attending all bonding events on this date is required for the "Bonding" trophy. **Save before this.**
blocks.heading: December 26

blocks.content:
*   Go to **Bareahard Airport** and enter the *Courageous* to end the day.
*   **AP Calculation:** Total AP earned determines your rank.
    *   **S Rank:** Requires **38 AP**.
blocks.heading: Finalizing the Act

blocks.heading: December 27
Data
rows: Purchase from Dorothee at Courageous 2F (Book Room).
Speak to Josef at Arseid Mansion (Legram).
Purchase at Fortnum Books, Christie's Galleria 2F (Bareahard).
Purchase at Fortnum Books, Christie's Galleria 2F (Bareahard).
Speak to Spare at Aurochs Fort (Rest Area - Crescent Moon).
Lohengrin Castle, SW corner (Second Playthrough only).

blocks.content:
**Walkthrough:**
When you regain control, explore the ship.
1.  **3rd Floor:** Speak to **Munk** and **Klein** to update profiles. Speak to **Jusis** for a short event.
2.  **2nd Floor:** Speak to **Dorothee** to update her profile, then purchase the **Curry** recipe. Speak to **Kenneth** in the cafeteria, then talk to **Emma** or **Celine** for a short event.
3.  **1st Floor:** Speak to **Paula**. Play the **Blade** mini-game to raise Link EXP.
4.  **Bridge:** Speak to **Towa** and set destination to **Ymir**.

**A: Two-Team Battle Prep**
At the end of this Act, you will fight two consecutive battles with different teams (including guest characters).
*   **Weapons:** Craft 10 weapons for Class VII (Sara does not participate).
*   **Quartz:** Assemble Attack Stacks (Attack 3) for high STR members (Rean, Laura, Gaius, Millium).
*   **Accessories:** Obtain 4 Warrior/Gladiator Badge accessories. Build a **Canceler Set** (Rean) and **Dodge Set** (Fie).
*   **ARCUS:** Ensure Rean, Laura, Fie, and Emma have two Level 2 slots (one elemental, one non-elemental).

**B: Sepith & Level Building**
*   **Goal:** 90,000+ Mira and ample Fire/Time Sepith.
*   **Method:** Convert excess Water/Earth Sepith (batches of 1000) to Mira.
*   **Grinding:** Fight every enemy in the 3 remaining Shrines. Complete Trial Chests (2 per cave) for grinding.
*   **Target Level:** Aim for **Lv 107–109** for fighters/tanks.

**C: Alisa & Beryl**
*   **Alisa:** If active in boss fights, she permanently gains the **True Gladiator Belt** and links to Rean (switching to Fie if needed).
*   **Snowboarding:** Complete the new course to get the **Passionate Rouge** accessory.
*   **Ymir Valley Event:** Manually enter Ymir Valley (Quick Travel won't trigger it). Go to the very end to find **Beryl**. Speak to her to recruit her.
*   **Fortune Teller:** Return to Courageous and speak to Beryl in the **Fortune Room (2F, SE room)** to check relationship status and bonding trophy eligibility.

*   Craft **Attack Ex-Orbs** for Valimar.

**Mech Battle (Goliath B & Kestrel B):**

**Team B Boss Battle: Thors Academy**

    *   **Machias:** Burst Drive.

**Team A Boss Battle: Thors Academy**

*   **Strategy:**

If you have **67 AP**, you achieve an **S Rank**.
